texto: I'm only leaving you for a handful of days, but it feels as though I'll be gone forever—- the way the door closes behind me with such solidity, the way my suitcase carries everything I'd need for an eternity of traveling light. I've left my hotel number on your desk, instructions about the dog and heating dinner. But like the weather front they warn is on its way with its switchblades of wind and ice, our lives have minds of their own.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Linda Pastan: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de esforço, persistência e resultados. O trecho “I'm only leaving you for a handful of days, but it feels as though I'll be gone forever—- the way…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, poem, leaving pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de viagem e reflexao.

frase_original: I'm only leaving you for a handful of days, but it feels as though I'll be gone forever—- the way the door closes behind me with such solidity, the way my suitcase carries everything I'd need for an eternity of traveling light. I've left my hotel number on your desk, instructions about the dog and heating dinner. But like the weather front they warn is on its way with its switchblades of wind and ice, our lives have minds of their own.

texto: Just looking at themI grow greedy, as if they werefreshly baked loaveswaiting on their shelvesto be broken open--that oneand that--and I make my choicein a mood of exalted luck,browsing among themlike a cow in sweetest pasture.For life is continuousas long as they waitto be read--these inked pathsopening into the future, pageafter page, every bookits own receding horizon.And I hold them, one in each hand,a curious ballast weighing mehere to earth.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Linda Pastan: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de sentido da existência e experiência vivida. O trecho “Just looking at themI grow greedy, as if they werefreshly baked loaveswaiting on their shelvesto …” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, poem, looking pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de reflexao.

texto: I have dreamed of our bed as if it were a shore where we would be washed up, not this striped mattress we must cover with sheets. [from "After an Absence"]
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Linda Pastan: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a motivacao. O trecho “I have dreamed of our bed as if it were a shore where we would be washed up, not this striped mat…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que motivacao, dreams, love pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de love.

texto: What we want is never simple.
explicacao: Citação de Linda Pastan sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “What we want is never simple.” articula reflexao, adversity, never em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.

texto: To be the other womanis to be a seasonthat is always about to end,when the air is floweredwith jasmine and peach,and the weather day after dayis flawless,and the forecastis hurricane.
